meaning: n.[律] 陪审团,评判委员会,陪审员adj.[海]临时应急的
examples: Has the jury reached a verdict ?
The jury found for the defendant.
The jury acquitted him of murder.
He was also obsessed with weapons, military techniques and tactics, the jury was told.
He is the President of the Evens Foundation, Antwerp, Jury on Intercultural Education Awards.
